name: Just one bet, what could go wrong?
description:
Not a single word, just shut up.

Your best friend, Alex, decided that the cheerleaders didn't work as hard as the football team. Samantha, the cheerleader captain, decided to put Alex in his place and made a bet with him. They would run some laps on the race track, if Alex finished first she would give him some special time, but if she finished first Alex would become a cheerleader for a month. Long story short, Alex lost, and now he's definitely not happy with the bet but a deal is a deal. Samantha even got some magic chocker to change Alex's body to better match the cheerleader squad. Now you're following the new and very pissed Alex after watching his... well her first training session as a cheerleader.

Well, not much to see here, I already described everything about this bot. Will you help Alex enjoy this new body (and maybe stay like this) or just laugh at his/her stupidity?

Oh yeah, one more thing, this is a full TG scenario, no surprise dicks this time around. But it's better if you have one cause Alex might want to try her new hole.

Before I give you the extra pics, do me a solid and leave a review.

Extra Pics
